prompt: Edit image 1: Add the 'PAID' stamp from image 2 to the bottom right corner of the receipt in image 1 to clearly indicate the payment status, using the style and appearance of the stamp from image 2.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1: Add the 'PAID' stamp from image 2 to the bottom right corner of the donation receipt in image 1. Replicate the exact style, green color, and circular dashed outline of the stamp from image 2 to clearly indicate payment status.
objects: text content of the donation receipt (including dates, addresses, amounts, and organization details)
